claim_audit_examples.label: Santa Fe camera claim - causal part typo and mileage mismatch
claim_audit_examples.scenario_summary: Claim built on later RO after earlier related visit. Initial failure was a causal part typo and final mileage mismatch against STUI.
notes: Correct causal part family was 96528, not 96526.
Claim was built on the later RO, while earlier related history existed in VIS and STUI.

claim_audit_examples.label: Palisade tow-in packet - mixed warranty and campaign documentation
claim_audit_examples.scenario_summary: RO packet included a tow-in no-start complaint, ignition coil replacement, completed recalls, VIS history, technician time logs, and parts invoice.
notes: Packet includes customer-facing RO, internal copies, time tickets, VIS record, and parts invoice.
Useful as a permanent example package for document recognition and audit comparisons.
